author: pantuza
text: Contribution to enable Stomp transport protocol

author: pantuza
text:
Hi,

Searching about Celery support for [Stomp](https://stomp.github.io/) I've seen that the only implementation available is [kombu-stomp](https://github.com/ntteurope/kombu-stomp) project but it does not appears to have any maintenance since May-2015, also only supports Stomp version 1.0.

Is this project official? It sounds [that not](http://docs.celeryproject.org/en/latest/faq.html#can-i-use-celery-with-activemq-stomp)!

If really not, I would like to ask you:

1. Is it a desired feature?
2. May I do that contribution for Kombu?

Celery is a mature software and I think this contribution would benefit lots of projects that relies, for example, on [ActiveMQ](http://activemq.apache.org/). Also, increase transport clients of Kombu.

Best regards.
